sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Aims, knowledge/skills/values learning objectives, design principles, compulsory/extended part structure.
Number and Algebra, Measures Shapes and Space, Data Handling strands; 18 learning units including advanced learning units.
Foundation knowledge, calculus, statistics and advanced learning unit for Module 1.
Foundation knowledge, algebra, calculus and advanced learning unit for Module 2.
Public exam design (Compulsory Paper 1 / Paper 2; Module 1 / Module 2 papers), assessment objectives, question styles, grading principles.

split_recommendations.topics_json: Compulsory part strands and learning units; Module 1 and Module 2 foundation/calculus/statistics/algebra learning units as topic nodes; advanced learning units as references only.
split_recommendations.assessment_json: Paper structure, assessment objectives, question styles, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds.
split_recommendations.references: Advanced learning units, curriculum planning notes, teaching strategies, resource lists.

known_risks: Extractor and reviewer are the same agent; confidence capped at medium.
Rendered pages not produced; visual review pending.
Detailed annual exam item counts and calculator/formula-sheet rules are outside this guide; rely on HKEAA exam regulations for verification.
Mathematical notation in extracted text may contain rendering artefacts; scope statements avoid copying raw formula lines.
notes: No large passages of official text copied; only structured summaries and page references recorded.
